results.title: Trends & Strategies in Asia-Pacific's $35+ Billion Data Center Construction Market, 2026-2031
results.description: Key highlights include significant investments in AI-ready data centers, with EdgeConneX and Kagoya Asset Management developing in Osaka, Japan, and ESR expanding in Hong Kong Key highlights include significant investments in AI-ready data centers, with EdgeConneX and Kagoya Asset Management developing in Osaka, Japan, and ESR expanding in Hong Kong
